mechanics.raw_text:
Detects and ‘graphically displays psi activity in the environ- ment, Presence of psi activity is detected with some reliability, bt indication of direction and range of psi activity from unit is extremely Unreliable, (Psi activity is defined as the-use fof any psionic mutant power) Available only for models I, Il, and IV. Range varies with ‘model number: model i! — 0-25 m(); model Ml — 0:100 mi); model 1V — 0-100 mi) 
Toxic Analysis: Identifies most of the more ‘common toxic substances. Samples are placed ina small lab unit connected to the mult Corder. Rarer and more subtle toxins may not be identified, Available for all models 
Life Form Recognition: Compares visual, x ray, infrared and other data with library references to identify plant or animal forms, Provides a concise summary of significant facts, about the life form and permits remote radio ‘access to more complete reference libraries Programs are available for various different ecological provinces; life forms not native to that province will probably not be identified properly. Available for all models, 
find out how to operate it and all about its capabilities. In. normal circumstances, only citizens of the appropriate clearance are assigned vehicles, However, The Computer considers Trouble- shooter missions of the utmost importance to Alpha Complex, and unstintingly assigns resources to Troubleshooter missions when needed, Frequently, Troubleshooters are assigned vehicles of much higher clearance — Blue, Indigo or Violet.
